reasonNotMoved: Current local master is stale/diverged from origin/master and dry merge-tree reports conflicts in Map Explorer files.

urbanAnalytics.evidence: Local helper reports all Urban Analytics prompts are completed or skipped with reason; origin/master ledger records all 30 prompts complete.

synapseIde.evidence: Local helper reports all Synapse IDE prompts are completed or skipped with reason; origin/master ledger records all 30 prompts complete.

mapExplorer.localHelper: Prompt 25 - Review Timeline and Audit Trail
mapExplorer.remoteLedger: Map Explorer prompt ladder complete. 30 of 30 prompts completed.

preArchiveActions: Reconcile local master with origin/master without dropping local work.
Resolve Map Explorer conflicts using origin/master ledger completion as the preferred execution record unless live code proves otherwise.
Run scripts/get-next-urban-analytics-prompt.ps1, scripts/get-next-synapse-ide-prompt.ps1, and scripts/get-next-map-explorer-prompt.ps1 on the reconciled branch.
Confirm all helpers report no pending prompts or all_completed.
Move completed tri-modal operating-pack files into the archive target.
Leave root README/start stubs that point future agents to the archive target and to COLOR_SYSTEM_PLANS for new color work.
